# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

default:
  tags: []

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fetch
  BUILD_SCRIPT: ./ci/build.sh

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND" ]; then
        echo "Running custom build command"
        sh -lc "$CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND"
      elif [ -f "$BUILD_SCRIPT" ]; then
        echo "Running build script: $BUILD_SCRIPT"
        chmod +x "$BUILD_SCRIPT" || true
        "$BUILD_SCRIPT"
      elif [ -f "./build.sh" ]; then
        echo "Running fallback build script: ./build.sh"
        chmod +x ./build.sh || true
        ./build.sh
      elif [ -f "./ci/build" ]; then
        echo "Running fallback build script: ./ci/build"
        chmod +x ./ci/build || true
        ./ci/build
      else
        echo "No build script found and CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND is not set."
        echo "Provide a repository build script or set CUSTOM_BUILD_COMMAND."
        exit 1
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE'
  artifacts:
    when: always
    paths:
      - build/
      - dist/
      - out/
    expire_in: 1 week
